meaning: n.反胃,晕船,恶心,作呕,极度的不快
examples: Nausea and vomiting are common symptoms.
I was overcome with a feeling of nausea.
Twenty percent of patients on Victoza had nausea, 11% had vomiting, and 13% had diarrhea.
Venkateshwarlu ticks off the effects of overexposure: diarrhea, nausea, difficulty in breathing, convulsions, headaches and depression.
